audience: SME owners, marketers and property or location managers considering an interactive tour for sales, orientation, documentation, training or support.
primaryDutchSearchIntent: KMO's uitleggen wat een 3D-tour is, hoe capture en publicatie werken en welke keuzes rond doel, kwaliteit, hosting, privacy, toegankelijkheid en website-integratie vooraf nodig zijn.

searchIntent.question: What is a 3D tour, how does it work and what should a business check before commissioning one?
searchIntent.geographicContext: International English-speaking readers, with Belgian and EU privacy context and VisualVibe services based in Limburg, Belgium.

longTailKeywords: how does a 3D virtual tour work
directAnswer: A 3D tour is an interactive digital representation of a physical space. Visitors move between capture points in a browser, look around and, depending on the platform, view a floor plan, spatial model, labels or measurements. Its usefulness depends on the purpose, capture quality, hosting, privacy, accessibility and website context.
title: What is a 3D tour? A complete guide for businesses
metaDescription: What is a 3D tour and how does it work? Learn about 360 capture, spatial models, hosting, privacy, accessibility and website integration before commissioning one.
h1: What is a 3D tour? From capture to a useful virtual walkthrough

internalLinks.anchor: how a virtual tour can build trust
complete guide to having a website built

factsToPreserve: A 3D tour is not necessarily VR or AR.
Available functions depend on the capture method and platform.
Marketing viewer measurements are not automatically suitable for technical or safety-critical decisions.
Interactive tours may depend on cloud hosting, an active subscription and platform-specific account terms.
Privacy must be planned before capture and automatic blur is not a complete privacy control.
An interactive tour requires accessible alternatives for essential information and actions.
A tour alone does not prove faster sales, fewer visits or improved conversion.
